title: oenothera brevipes subsp. pallidula
intro: Oenothera brevipes subsp. pallidula, also known as the pallid evening primrose, is a plant species belonging to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The medicinal properties of Oenothera brevipes subsp. pallidula include its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), a polyunsaturated fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve skin health. Oenothera brevipes subsp. pallidula is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures, to support women's health and promote overall well-being.
